Get Started

Upper Arlington, Ohio  ·  Garage Gym Training

Coop Camp

Personal training for all ages and fitness levels. Whether you're just starting out or looking to push your fitness further, Coop Camp builds a plan around you.

Start Training See What We Offer

Your Trainer

Hi, I'm Caroline Cooper

I'm a certified personal trainer and mom of three with a passion for health and fitness. After competing in Division I Cross Country and Track at Davidson College, where I earned a BS in Psychology, I went on to complete my Master of Public Health at The Ohio State University.

I hold ACE certifications in both Personal Training and Fitness Nutrition, and I've continued to train and explore new ways to stay fit through cross training and strength work.

My husband and I work out together in our home garage gym right here in Upper Arlington, and we love staying active with our kids. Fitness isn't a phase, it's a way of life, with endless benefits both physically and mentally.

Certifications

ACE Certified Personal Trainer
ACE Fitness Nutrition Specialist

What We Offer

Training Built Around You

We work with clients of all ages and fitness levels. Every class is a 50 minute session with a combination of strength and cardio training. Sessions are varied so you always have something new to push toward.

👥

Group Sessions

Bring a friend or join a group. Training together keeps you motivated, accountable, and makes every session more fun.

🤸

Warm-Up & Mobility

Every session begins with a dynamic warm-up and mobility work, both key to keeping your body healthy and moving well for the long term.

💪

Strength & Cardio

Each class combines strength training and cardio for a complete, efficient workout.
